track_record.frame_line: Observational — settlement tracking; registered verdict metrics govern.
track_record.visibility_markdown:
## M-1 Outcomes

Observational — settlement tracking; registered verdict metric is excess CLV.
Outcome denominator basis: PA-valid settled player-market rows only; zero-PA and absent-boxscore rows are VOID.
Retroactive-grading note: CLV sign is rendered from captured closes where available; this is report visibility only.

### 2026-07-19 settlements

| Market | Picks | Hits | Hit rate | Avg implied prob at pick |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Doubles | 51 | 10 | 19.6% | 17.8% |
| Hits | 63 | 28 | 44.4% | 55.4% |
| HR | 36 | 8 | 22.2% | 15.3% |
| Total bases | 82 | 35 | 42.7% | 46.8% |

HR subgroup (secondary only; no HR-specific verdict): matched-close coverage=36/36 (100.0%); unmatched=0.

#### CLV-sign split

| Market | CLV bucket | Picks | Hits | Hit rate |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Doubles | negative/flat CLV | 39 | 7 | 17.9% |
| Doubles | positive CLV | 12 | 3 | 25.0% |
| Hits | negative/flat CLV | 42 | 19 | 45.2% |
| Hits | positive CLV | 21 | 9 | 42.9% |
| HR | negative/flat CLV | 20 | 4 | 20.0% |
| HR | positive CLV | 16 | 4 | 25.0% |
| Total bases | negative/flat CLV | 51 | 19 | 37.3% |
| Total bases | positive CLV | 31 | 16 | 51.6% |

Positive-CLV-and-hit names: CJ Abrams — Doubles 0.5 @ theScore Bet; Royce Lewis — Doubles 0.5 @ Hard Rock Bet (OH); Seiya Suzuki — Doubles 0.5 @ Hard Rock Bet (OH); Andy Pages — Hits 0.5 @ BetMGM; Brandon Marsh — Hits 0.5 @ DraftKings; Brett Baty — Hits 0.5 @ Bally Bet; Coby Mayo — Hits 0.5 @ BetMGM; Gabriel Arias — Hits 0.5 @ Hard Rock Bet (OH); Jackson Merrill — Hits 1.5 @ Hard Rock Bet (OH); Royce Lewis — Hits 0.5 @ BetOnline.ag; Ty France — Hits 0.5 @ DraftKings; Zach Neto — Hits 0.5 @ BetMGM; Coby Mayo — HR 0.5 @ BetMGM; Jackson Merrill — HR 0.5 @ betPARX; Ty France — HR 0.5 @ Hard Rock Bet (OH); Victor Mesa Jr. — HR 0.5 @ betPARX; Brett Baty — Total bases 0.5 @ Hard Rock Bet (OH); CJ Abrams — Total bases 1.5 @ BetOnline.ag; Carter Jensen — Total bases 1.5 @ BetOnline.ag; Drake Baldwin — Total bases 1.5 @ Bally Bet; Dylan Crews — Total bases 1.5 @ Fanatics; Gabriel Arias — Total bases 0.5 @ Hard Rock Bet (OH); Jackson Merrill — Total bases 1.5 @ Hard Rock Bet (OH); Jordan Walker — Total bases 1.5 @ BetMGM; Michael Busch — Total bases 1.5 @ betPARX; Pete Crow-Armstrong — Total bases 1.5 @ DraftKings; Riley Greene — Total bases 1.5 @ theScore Bet; Royce Lewis — Total bases 1.5 @ Hard Rock Bet; Sal Stewart — Total bases 1.5 @ BetOnline.ag; Ty France — Total bases 1.5 @ BetOnline.ag; Victor Mesa Jr. — Total bases 0.5 @ BetMGM; Willson Contreras — Total bases 1.5 @ DraftKings.
